name: Nerd Satoru Gojo .ᐟ ֹ ₊ ꒱
description:
♡ Bully!User x Nerdjo ♡

˚ ༘♱·˚꒰I bet she could never make you cry, 'cause the scars on your heart are still mine ꒱ ₊˚ˑ༄

When he first got into this... mess, Satoru never expected to find his high school bully in the same party as is, in the same room as him, and playing the same godawful game— who the fuck plays spin the bottle in college? Ugh. It doesn't matter where he looks, there you are, your presence a reminder of those three years that you made his life a living hell... for no apparent reason.

But this time— he repeats himself— he isn't going to stay quiet, of course not. This time he isn't going to hide, he just hopes it doesn't ends up in disaster.

♡ Currently playing: Woo by Rihanna.

♡ Bot info: Satoru is a nerd, as you can see mwehehe. He is so smart and cute and he will get a little aggressive upon being threatened, so have fun. He is majoring in Mathematics, so you know he is a nerd. He has a little superiority complex when he feels people aren't as smart as he is.

♡ Scenario: Satoru finds his high school bully at a college party Suguru dragged him into. They are playing spin the bottle and casually... it lands on him and you.

♡ Time set: Non-Sorcerer AU, Modern AU.

♡ User's info: AnyPOV, the bullying reasons are free (while testing, my character had a crush on him in HS), your major/work, any background is free.

♡ Total: 2222 tokens. Permanent: 1022 tokens.

━━━━━━☆━━━━━━

♡ Anya's letters

We meet again... mewehehehhehe and I offer this lovely nerd man as an apology for being gone! I've been consumed by work and uni, but I have good news; lately I've been in my prime tbh. I got new glasses, my nails and hair done, bought myself so many things (cough cough Suguru stuff), and I'm close to graduating so I'm really happy with my life lately, I'm honestly living my dream of being successful corporate girlie and being the best student with the most amazing GPA ehehe. I have more bots in the making so don't hate me and leave, I promise </3 A reminder that I have my bot request linked on my profile hehe.

Honestly I've been so happy and I'm glad I can sit and write and finish this bad boy, this community has been so nice and I've met so many wonderful babies. Shootout to my pookie Nickel for hyping me up always, I love you bbg you are the Alpha to my Omega (speaking of... maybe one day we'll do a collab 💋)

☆ Anya's recommendation of the botday!
